analysis-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.3.5 to 4.0.6 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 4 ecosystem.
analysis-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 requires Java 21 as a baseline; using the old parent version would cause dependency resolution conflicts and incompatibility with Spring Boot 4 managed dependencies.

analysis-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the managed Java version property from 17 to 21 to enforce Java 21 compilation and runtime.
analysis-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 and its dependencies require Java 21 features; compiling with Java 17 settings would fail or produce incompatible bytecode.

analysis-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-flyway dependency to enable Flyway auto-configuration, which was moved to a separate starter in Spring Boot 4.
analysis-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 removed Flyway auto-configuration from the core starter; without this dependency, database migrations will not run automatically at startup.

analysis-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add flyway-database-postgresql dependency to provide the PostgreSQL-specific Flyway support module.
analysis-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 modularized Flyway; the core starter no longer includes database-specific drivers, causing runtime errors if the specific database module is missing.

analysis-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-webmvc-test dependency to provide test slices for Web MVC, which were modularized in Spring Boot 4.
analysis-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 moved test slice infrastructure (like @AutoConfigureMockMvc) to separate starters; without this, web tests will fail to compile or run due to missing annotations/configurations.

analysis-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-data-jpa-test dependency to provide test slices for Data JPA, which were modularized in Spring Boot 4.
analysis-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 moved test slice infrastructure (like @DataJpaTest) to separate starters; without this, JPA tests will fail to compile or run due to missing annotations/configurations.

analysis-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-jdbc-test dependency to provide test utilities for JDBC, which were modularized in Spring Boot 4.
analysis-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 moved JDBC test utilities to a separate starter; without this, JDBC-related tests may fail due to missing test support classes.

analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.general_idea: Exclude BatchJobLauncherAutoConfiguration to prevent automatic job execution at startup in Spring Boot 4.
analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 removed the spring.batch.job.enabled property; without exclusion, the auto-configured launcher attempts to run jobs on startup, causing JobInstanceAlreadyCompleteException in single-job setups.

analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.general_idea: Add import for BatchJobLauncherAutoConfiguration to support the exclusion annotation.
analysis-service/src/main/java/de/unfall.why_exists: The class BatchJobLauncherAutoConfiguration is not imported, causing a compilation error when referenced in the annotation.

analysis-service/src/test/java/de/unfall.general_idea: Update import for AutoConfigureMockMvc to the new package path in Spring Boot 4.
analysis-service/src/test/java/de/unfall.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.web.servlet.AutoConfigureMockMvc was removed or moved in Spring Boot 4; using the old import causes a compile error.

analysis-service/src/test/java/de/unfall.general_idea: Replace autowired Jackson ObjectMapper with a local instance due to Spring Boot 4 / Jackson 3 migration.
analysis-service/src/test/java/de/unfall.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 uses Jackson 3 (tools.jackson) and no longer provides a com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper bean by default; autowiring the old type causes a NoSuchBeanDefinitionException at runtime.
analysis-service/src/test/java/de/unfall.after: private final ObjectMapper json = new ObjectMapper();
